tests.description: ATDD Unit tests for PGlite Web Worker restoration and lock handling (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC-1 (Auto-Purge Recovery): When PGlite.create throws "Database already exists" during a restoration, the worker must successfully purge the existing storage and retry initialization.
AC-2 (Lock Handling): When OPFS throws NoModificationAllowedError, the worker must retry up to 3 times with backoff.

summary: Generated 2 FAILING unit tests for PGlite worker recovery and lock handling scenarios
